trajectory.description: Observation: Baseline 18.37% with CLIP ViT-B/16, 3 epochs. Analysis: Need to bridge domain gap to Quickdraw sketches. Key insight: Quickdraw images are black strokes on white background. Augmentations that make source images look more sketch-like should help. Decision: Add aggressive sketch-bridging augmentations (high grayscale prob, Canny edges, random inversion), train for 12 epochs with cosine schedule.
